topic: the Mighty Ducks (of Anaheim) (the Anaheim Ducks)
title: D3: The Mighty Ducks
summary: D3: The Mighty Ducks is a 1996 American sports comedy-drama film directed by Robert Lieberman and sequel to the 1994 film D2: The Mighty Ducks. It is the final installment in the Mighty Ducks trilogy and was produced by Walt Disney Pictures and distributed by Buena Vista Pictures Distribution. It stars Emilio Estevez, Heidi Kling, Joss Ackland, Joshua Jackson, Elden Henson, Shaun Weiss, Matt Doherty, Garette Ratliff Henson, Marguerite Moreau, Vincent Larusso, Aaron Lohr, Ty O'Neal, Kenan Thompson, Mike Vitar, Colombe Jacobsen, and Justin Wong, who reprise their roles from the previous films in the series. Scott Whyte, who played Gunnar in the second film, returns in a different role and Jeffrey Nordling joins the cast.
extract: D3: The Mighty Ducks (also known as The Mighty Ducks 3) is a 1996 American sports comedy-drama film directed by Robert Lieberman and sequel to the 1994 film D2: The Mighty Ducks. It is the final installment in the Mighty Ducks trilogy and was produced by Walt Disney Pictures and distributed by Buena Vista Pictures Distribution. It stars Emilio Estevez, Heidi Kling, Joss Ackland, Joshua Jackson, Elden Henson, Shaun Weiss, Matt Doherty, Garette Ratliff Henson, Marguerite Moreau, Vincent Larusso, Aaron Lohr, Ty O'Neal, Kenan Thompson, Mike Vitar, Colombe Jacobsen, and Justin Wong, who reprise their roles from the previous films in the series. Scott Whyte, who played Gunnar in the second film, returns in a different role and Jeffrey Nordling joins the cast.
